source_text: The legacy software is expected to be phased out by the end of Q3, a decision which has left many departments wondering how their daily operations will be affected.
expected_behavior: Full chain should split naturally and avoid 'neden oldu' style translationese.

source_text: The customer data privacy compliance monitoring system needs to be updated before the audit.
expected_behavior: Full chain should unpack the noun stack into clear Turkish.

source_text: The report was reviewed by the committee and was approved after several minor revisions.
expected_behavior: Full chain should choose natural formal Turkish passive or active.

source_text: The support team will follow up with each regional office after the migration is complete.
expected_behavior: Full chain should avoid literal phrasal-verb transfer.

source_text: Management wants the rollout to be completed quickly, but not at the expense of customer trust.
expected_behavior: Full chain should preserve the contrast and avoid stiff corporate wording.

source_text: This study examines how remote collaboration affects decision quality in distributed engineering teams.
expected_behavior: Full chain should keep academic claim precise and readable.

source_text: He stood at the door. Silent. Waiting.
expected_behavior: Full chain should preserve fragments and avoid over-explaining.

source_text: The announcement threw cold water on the team's optimism.
expected_behavior: Full chain should use natural Turkish idiom, not literal wording.

source_text: She told him that she would send him the file when she finished reviewing it.
expected_behavior: Full chain should reduce unnecessary pronouns.

source_text: The update from the finance team about the delay in the payment process arrived after the meeting.
expected_behavior: Full chain should unpack prepositional phrases into natural Turkish.

source_text: The vendor that manages the platform which stores regional invoices will be replaced next month.
expected_behavior: Full chain should split or reorder nested relative clauses.

source_text: The energy market volatility prediction accuracy evaluation framework is tested across three datasets.
expected_behavior: Full chain should unpack the noun pile while preserving academic claim.

source_text: Went back to the window. No answer. Only the rain.
expected_behavior: Full chain should preserve implied subject and fragment rhythm.

source_text: The failed pilot opened the door to a more careful redesign.
expected_behavior: Full chain should avoid literal door imagery if it sounds unnatural.

source_text: The new policy applies to all vendors who process customer records, which means the procurement team must update every active contract this month.
expected_behavior: Full chain should split the policy scope and required action.

source_text: On December 25, 2024, the company paid 150,000 TL for the license renewal.
expected_behavior: Full chain should preserve numbers and convert date to Turkish format.

source_text: The treatment reduced symptoms by 40 percent, but caused fatigue in 20 percent of patients.
expected_behavior: Full chain must NOT swap the percentages or drop one.

source_text: The rain fell softly on the roof.
expected_behavior: Full chain should NOT over-edit this simple literary sentence.

source_text: The delay has left customers wondering how their orders will be affected.
expected_behavior: Full chain's target naturalness pass should avoid 'merak etmesine neden oldu'.

source_text: Blood. Time. The desert stretched before them like a white page.
expected_behavior: Full chain should preserve sparse literary fragments; NOT expand or explain them.
